sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 30:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 30:1
items.html: When the upper light reached phase four and touched it in order to expand in it, the force of the restriction was awakened, which is a screen to stop it and push it back. (Inner Observation, Item 56)
